intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“Wayle 小河 -> 河岸 -> 孩子玩球 -> 河上划船 -> 球飞向船 -> 差点落水 -> 孩子跑掉 -> 球回到岸上”的动作路线读顺。

sentences.text: The Wayle is a small river that cuts across the park near my home.
sentences.focus_zh: The Wayle 是小河名；cuts across the park 要读成一条地点路线。

sentences.text: It was warm last Sunday, so I went and sat on the river bank as usual.
sentences.focus_zh: so 后面给出行动结果；river bank 是河岸，不是银行。

sentences.text: Some children were playing games on the bank and there were some people rowing on the river.
sentences.focus_zh: on the bank 和 on the river 对比清楚；rowing 是用桨划船。

sentences.text: Suddenly, one of the children kicked a ball very hard and it went towards a passing boat.
sentences.focus_zh: Suddenly 后面稍停；towards a passing boat 是球的运动方向。

sentences.text: Some people on the bank called out to the man in the boat, but he did not hear them.
sentences.focus_zh: called out 是大声提醒；but 后面读出提醒没有成功。

sentences.text: The ball struck him so hard that he nearly fell into the water.
sentences.focus_zh: so hard that... 是原因加结果；nearly fell into the water 要读出“差点”。

sentences.text: I turned to look at the children, but there weren't any in sight: they had all run away!
sentences.focus_zh: in sight 是看得见；had all run away 表示在回头看之前已经跑掉了。

sentences.text: He called out to the children and threw the ball back to the bank.
sentences.focus_zh: back to the bank 是球回到岸上；这句收住标题笑点。
